---
name: Broken site
about: A site where BannerBye doesn't kill the cookie banner
title: "[broken] "
labels: broken-site
---

## ✋ Before you file this issue

**The fastest path is the in-extension button**, not GitHub.

Open the BannerBye popup → tap **"Report broken site"**. The hostname is pre-filled and lands straight in our inbox. We fix most reports within a few days by pushing a rules update — no GitHub round-trip needed, no new extension release.

GitHub issues are best for cases where you want to add detail, attach screenshots, or discuss the fix publicly. If a one-tap report is enough, please use that.

---

## If you're still here

**Site URL**: <!-- e.g. https://example.com -->

**What you saw** (one of the below):
- [ ] Banner still appears (BannerBye didn't refuse it)
- [ ] Banner appears, then disappears (auto-click works but you see the flash)
- [ ] Page broken / blank / errors after BannerBye install
- [ ] Something else: <!-- describe -->

**BannerBye version**: <!-- popup → about, or chrome://extensions -->

**Browser**: <!-- Chrome 130 / Firefox 130 / Safari 18 / Edge 130 -->

**OS**: <!-- macOS 15 / Windows 11 / iOS 18 -->

**Screenshot** (optional): <!-- drag & drop here -->

**Console errors** (optional): <!-- DevTools → Console, paste relevant -->
